html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Lush Carpet is a naturally generated type of Flooring exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama update and can be found on the Stage Set Piece or on a one tile large Briar Wolf Set Piece.

It is an alternative to the regular Carpeted Flooring and has a dark purple texture. It can also be crafted with one Board and one Beefalo Wool and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Trivia

  • The Last update where a new turf type was added, which is the Ancient Stonework, was Turn of the Tides, released in June 2019. Since then, Don't Starve Together hadn't received a new turf type. After almost 3 years, however, 10 new turf types were introduced, including the lush carpet.
  • Shade of Lush Carpet is the opposite of the regular one. (The latter is bright purple, while its lush variant is dark.)
  • Lush carpet shares the same crafting recipe with regular carpeted flooring.

Gallery

  • Lush Carpet concept art from Rhymes With Play stream.

Lush Carpet is a naturally generated type of Flooring exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama update and can be found on the Stage Set Piece or on a one tile large Briar Wolf Set Piece.
It is an alternative to the regular Carpeted Flooring and has a dark purple texture. It can also be crafted with one Board and one Beefalo Wool and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Last update where a new turf type was added, which is the Ancient Stonework, was Turn of the Tides, released in June 2019. Since then, Don't Starve Together hadn't received a new turf type. After almost 3 years, however, 10 new turf types were introduced, including the lush carpet.
Shade of Lush Carpet is the opposite of the regular one. (The latter is bright purple, while its lush variant is dark.)
Lush carpet shares the same crafting recipe with regular carpeted flooring.

{{Scrapbook Info|Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.}}
'''Lush Carpet''' is a naturally generated type of [[Turfs|Flooring]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It was added in ''[[A Little Drama and QOL|A Little Drama]]'' update and can be found on the [[Stage]] [[Set Piece]] or on a one tile large [[Briar Wolf|Briar Wolf Set Piece]].

It is an alternative to the regular [[Carpeted Flooring]] and has a dark purple texture. It can also be crafted with one [[Boards|Board]] and one [[Beefalo Wool]] and requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Last update where a new [[Turfs|turf]] type was added, which is the Ancient Stonework, was ''Turn of the Tides'', released in June 2019. Since then, ''Don't Starve Together'' hadn't received a new turf type. After almost 3 years, however, 10 new turf types were introduced, including the lush carpet.
* Shade of Lush Carpet is the opposite of the regular one. (The latter is bright purple, while its lush variant is dark.)
* Lush carpet shares the same crafting recipe with regular carpeted flooring.
